descriptions.duplicate: Identical to an already-emitted word after normalization.
descriptions.has_punct_or_space: Contains whitespace, hyphen, apostrophe, period, slash or other punctuation.
descriptions.nfc_renormalized: Surface form was not in NFC; re-normalized (kept, logged per D3).
descriptions.not_lowercase: Contains an uppercase letter (proper noun, acronym, or capitalized-only form).
descriptions.out_of_charset: Contains a character outside the language's allowed lowercase alphabet.
descriptions.too_short: Fewer than min_len characters (also removes single letters).

note: REVIEW-GATED output. Not wired into the shipped app. es rule set is a proposal for Eric (sources/es/FILTER-RULES.md).
